CLAUSE.NAME: Tag78MixedPayHANDGB
CLAUSE.value: + UPON RECEIPT AT OUR COUNTERS OF DOCUMENTS WHICH ARE IN STRICT ACCORDANCE WITH THE L/C TERMS AND CONDITIONS, WE SHALL (A)REIMBURSE YOU AT SIGHT WITH XX PERCENT OF THE INVOICE VALUE (B)UNDERTAKE TO REIMBURSE YOU ON THE RESPECTIVE MATURITY DATE(S) WITH THE REMAINING XX PERCENT OF THE INVOICE VALUE
